meaning: adj.在稳压器控制下的,使用稳压器的 恒电势的
examples: Black conversion films could be fabricated using both the potentiostatic anodization and cyclic oxidation-reduction method.
Potentiodynamic sweep and electrochemical desorption under potentiostatic oxidation are used to investigate the hydrogen in steel.
The electropolymerization process of aniline in acidic aqueous solutions and some influential factors are investigated by potentiostatic method and cyclic voltammetry.
